name: RBFCU - Summit
description_short: RBFCU Summit is a credit union branch in San Antonio offering traditional banking services, safe deposit boxes, notary services, and 24/7 ATM access with teller assistance.
description_long: RBFCU (Randolph-Brooks Federal Credit Union) operates the Summit branch located at 6475 Baywater Drive in San Antonio, Texas. As a credit union branch, it serves members seeking traditional financial services in a community-based structure. The Summit branch provides comprehensive banking services including checking and savings accounts, loan applications, and member account management through both in-person and digital channels. The branch offers multiple financial services and conveniences designed for member accessibility. Members can access safe deposit boxes, use a member-use coin counter, obtain notary services, and acquire medallion signature guarantees. The location features a 24/7 drive-up ATM that accepts deposits around the clock, with teller assistance available during extended hours (Monday-Friday 7am-7pm, Saturday 8:30am-4pm). The physical branch maintains lobby hours Monday-Saturday, with scheduling available for appointments to meet with staff. The Summit branch distinguishes itself through extended ATM service hours with live teller support, which exceeds typical banking convenience. The routing number 314089681 enables direct deposit and ACH transactions. The credit union's mobile banking app provides digital account access, and members can apply for loans online or at the branch. Night deposit capabilities accommodate members unable to visit during standard business hours. As a single branch location of a larger credit union, the Summit branch is best suited for members already within RBFCU's service area or membership requirements. The branch operates under standard banking hours and holiday closures, and members requiring comprehensive loan products or specialized services may need to contact the main credit union office. The facility represents a standard credit union branch offering rather than innovative financial solutions.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 24/7 drive-up ATM with deposit acceptance available around the clock
Extended teller assistance at ATM (7am-7pm weekdays, 8:30am-4pm Saturdays)
Multiple ancillary services including safe deposit boxes, notary, and medallion signature guarantees
Member-use coin counter available for cash management
Night drop facility for deposits outside business hours
Online appointment scheduling for personalized service
Mobile banking app for digital account access and management
cons: Single branch location limits in-person service accessibility for non-local members
Standard banking hours (9am-5pm weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturday) may not accommodate all work schedules
No information provided about loan products, rates, or membership eligibility requirements
Membership likely restricted to RBFCU's defined service area or occupational groups
Limited detail on deposit insurance, account types, or savings products available
best_for: RBFCU members in the San Antonio area needing convenient local branch access
Individuals seeking 24/7 ATM deposits without branch visit requirements
Small business owners needing notary and medallion signature services
Members who prefer credit union banking with personalized appointment-based service
diagnosis: RBFCU Summit is best for existing credit union members in the San Antonio area seeking convenient local branch and ATM services. The main caveat is that credit union membership typically requires eligibility criteria (occupational groups, geographic service area, or sponsor membership), and this branch listing provides no information about membership requirements, account options, or loan products—requiring prospective members to contact RBFCU directly for detailed product and service information.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
